demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My toes feel like they are on fire when I lie down, and the only way to get a minute of peace is to hang my leg out of the bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: For the last two nights the burning in my right foot has been so bad I can't sleep at all — I'm exhausted and I can only settle it by dangling my leg over the side of the bed.

symptom_narrative.onset: the severe night pain started about 48 hours ago; the cramping in my calf when I walk has been building up over the past year
symptom_narrative.duration: two days of severe pain at night; about a year of walking trouble
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, burning, on-fire feeling in the toes of my right foot
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable at night — I haven't slept properly for two nights
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly the toes and front of my right foot; the ache with walking is in my right calf
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst when I lie flat in bed at night; the calf cramp comes on when I walk a certain distance
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: hanging my leg over the edge of the bed or standing up; resting stops the calf cramp when I walk
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat and lifting the leg up makes the foot pain much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the foot feels cold and the skin looks pale and shiny; I've noticed the hair has gone off my toes
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: for about a year I've had a cramping ache in my right calf after walking a block or two that eases off if I stop and rest
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: the lack of sleep and the pain are wearing me down and making it hard to look after myself at home on my own

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: smokes about 20 cigarettes a day and has done for years
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; the pain and lack of sleep are making it hard to get around and manage basic self-care

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff, not calibrated

objective_data_offered.value: the skin on my right foot looks pale and shiny and the toes have lost their hair; I keep the foot uncovered because even the blanket touching it hurts
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description over video; not a clinician examination
